title: narcissus tortuosus var. pallidiflorus
intro: Narcissus tortuosus var. pallidiflorus, also known as the Pale-flowering Twisted Jonquil, is a variety of the twisted jonquil plant, characterized by its pale-yellow or white flowers. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its chemical composition. The health benefits of Narcissus tortuosus var. pallidiflorus include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its possible use in reducing inflammation and fighting infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is necessary to fully understand its medicinal applications and potential interactions.
